properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Come Holy Spirit fall on me now I need Your anointing Come in Your power I love You Holy Spirit, You're captivating my soul And everyday I grow to love You more

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I'm reaching for Your heart You hold my life in Your hands Drawing me closer to You I feel Your power renew Nothing compares to this place Where I can see You face to face I worship You in Spirit and in truth

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Lord, I need Your Presence, come touch me now I can't live without You, I feel like I'm through You're the One who can restore me, so Faithful and so True Real happiness can only come from You

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Where can I ever be O God Your Word is the only source of life Where can I ever be O God I don't know where I could ever go apart from You
